meta.title: DeepLearning.AI Learner Community Event ft. Neelesh Kamkolkar
meta.description:
deeplearning.ai presents virtual mini-event series for our Learner Community of those taking the AI for Medicine specialization!

#MeetYourMentor: Mentors sharing their personal experiences of breaking into AI
#DeepDive: A deep dive into a specific area that the guest speaker is working on
and more!

This event will be at 10am PDT on June 16th featuring Neelesh Kamkolkar, an AI/ML product leader who has helped build scalable, high performance platforms at various enterprise companies.
 
Neelesh will share real world lessons from operationalizing ML models in production in a health care environment. His team has built many models ground up and deployed them in operational settings across a 16 hospital chain in US and to the entire population of Singapore via their Health Ministry. He will walk through challenges across model lifecycle, use of technology platforms, and collaborating across different functional team members in a modern AI/ML team.

 
Enroll in the AI For Medicine Specialization here:  https://bit.ly/2UBOUEO
Check out all our courses: https://bit.ly/39yz95P
